title: Contributor Code of Conduct
text: contributors maintainers project, pledge respect people contribute reporting issues, posting feature requests, updating documentation, submitting pull requests patches, activities. committed making participation project harassment-free experience everyone, regardless level experience, gender, gender identity expression, sexual orientation, disability, personal appearance, body size, race, ethnicity, age, religion. Examples unacceptable behavior participants include use sexual language imagery, derogatory comments personal attacks, trolling, public private harassment, insults, unprofessional conduct. Project maintainers right responsibility remove, edit, reject comments, commits, code, wiki edits, issues, contributions aligned Code Conduct. Project maintainers follow Code Conduct may removed project team. Instances abusive, harassing, otherwise unacceptable behavior may reported opening issue contacting one project maintainers. Code Conduct adapted Contributor Covenant (https://www.contributor-covenant.org), version 1.0.0, available https://contributor-covenant.org/version/1/0/0/.

what: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegSUIT
title: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegSUIT
text: ggseg 2.0 atlas package providing brain atlas data ggseg ecosystem. data-package custom functions.

title: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegSUIT
text: data/*.rda — Unified ggseg_atlas objects (2D + 3D one object) R/data.R — Roxygen2 documentation atlas R/ggsegSUIT-package.R — Package-level docs, imports ggseg.formats data-raw/ — Scripts generated/converted atlas data

title: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegSUIT
text: package depends ggseg.formats provides ggseg_atlas class. atlas objects work ggseg::geom_brain() (2D) ggseg3d::ggseg3d() (3D).

title: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegSUIT
text: Update docs: devtools::document() Run tests: devtools::test() (testthat edition 3, describe/style) Full check: devtools::check() Build pkgdown site: pkgdown::build_site()

title: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegSUIT
text: code comments except necessary workarounds Roxygen2 markdown enabled Tests use describe/BDD style vdiffr visual regression NEWS.md tracks user-facing changes (CI/pkgdown changes) URLs point ggseg GitHub org (LCBC-UiO)

what: SUIT Cerebellar Lobular Atlas for the ggseg Ecosystem
title: SUIT Cerebellar Lobular Atlas for the ggseg Ecosystem
text: SUIT cerebellar atlas ggseg plotting ecosystem. Provides SUIT anatomical parcellation cerebellum 34 regions covering lobules -X, vermis subdivisions, deep cerebellar nuclei (dentate, interposed, fastigial).

title: SUIT Cerebellar Lobular Atlas for the ggseg Ecosystem
text: recommend installing ggseg atlases ggseg r-universe: can install development version GitHub :
code: options(repos = c(     ggseg = "https://ggseg.r-universe.dev",     CRAN = "https://cloud.r-project.org"))  install.packages("ggsegSUIT") # install.packages("devtools") devtools::install_github("ggseg/ggsegSUIT")

title: SUIT Cerebellar Lobular Atlas for the ggseg Ecosystem
code: library(ggsegSUIT) library(ggseg) library(ggplot2)  plot(suit) +   theme(legend.position = "bottom",         legend.text = element_text(size = 7)) +   guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 4))

title: SUIT Cerebellar Lobular Atlas for the ggseg Ecosystem
text: NIfTI volume lookup tables data-raw/ DiedrichsenLab/cerebellar_atlases GitHub repository (Diedrichsen_2009 directory): https://github.com/DiedrichsenLab/cerebellar_atlases/tree/master/Diedrichsen_2009 Files used: atl-Anatom_space-MNI_dseg.nii – discrete segmentation volume (MNI152, 1mm) atl-Anatom.tsv – region index, name, hex color atl-Anatom.lut – FreeSurfer-style LUT RGB 0-1 floats

title: SUIT Cerebellar Lobular Atlas for the ggseg Ecosystem
text: Diedrichsen J, Balsters JH, Flavell J, Cussans E, Ramnani N (2009). probabilistic MR atlas human cerebellum. NeuroImage, 46(1):39-46. doi:[10.1016/j.neuroimage.2009.01.045](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.neuroimage.2009.01.045)

title: SUIT Cerebellar Lobular Atlas for the ggseg Ecosystem
text: Please note ggsegSUIT project released Contributor Code Conduct. contributing project, agree abide terms.

what: ggsegSUIT: SUIT Cerebellar Lobular Atlas for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem — ggsegSUIT-package
title: ggsegSUIT: SUIT Cerebellar Lobular Atlas for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem — ggsegSUIT-package
text: SUIT cerebellar parcellation anatomical lobules deep nuclei 'ggseg' ecosystem. Provides unified 'ggseg_atlas' object 2D polygon geometry 3D vertex indices, use 'ggseg' 'ggseg3d'.

title: ggsegSUIT: SUIT Cerebellar Lobular Atlas for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem — ggsegSUIT-package
SUIT Cerebellar Lobular Atlas — suit
text: Cerebellar parcellation anatomical lobules deep nuclei SUIT atlas (Diedrichsen et al., 2009). Contains 2D polygon geometry 3D meshes.

text: Diedrichsen J et al. (2009). probabilistic MR atlas human cerebellum. doi:10.1016/j.neuroimage.2009.01.045

title: SUIT Cerebellar Lobular Atlas — suit
code: data(suit) suit #>  #> ── suit ggseg atlas ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── #> Type: subcortical #> Regions: 21 #> Hemispheres: left, right, NA #> Views: axial_1, axial_2, coronal_1, sagittal, axial_3, coronal_2 #> Palette: ✔ #> Rendering: ✔ ggseg #> ✔ ggseg3d (meshes) #> ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── #> # A tibble: 34 × 3 #>    hemi  region        label            #>    <chr> <chr>         <chr>            #>  1 left  i iv          Left_I_IV        #>  2 right i iv          Right_I_IV       #>  3 left  v             Left_V           #>  4 right v             Right_V          #>  5 left  vi            Left_VI          #>  6 NA    vermis vi     Vermis_VI        #>  7 right vi            Right_VI         #>  8 left  crusi         Left_CrusI       #>  9 NA    vermis crusi  Vermis_CrusI     #> 10 right crusi         Right_CrusI      #> 11 left  crusii        Left_CrusII      #> 12 NA    vermis crusii Vermis_CrusII    #> 13 right crusii        Right_CrusII     #> 14 left  viib          Left_VIIb        #> 15 NA    vermis viib   Vermis_VIIb      #> 16 right viib          Right_VIIb       #> 17 left  viiia         Left_VIIIa       #> 18 NA    vermis viiia  Vermis_VIIIa     #> 19 right viiia         Right_VIIIa      #> 20 left  viiib         Left_VIIIb       #> 21 NA    vermis viiib  Vermis_VIIIb     #> 22 right viiib         Right_VIIIb      #> 23 left  ix            Left_IX          #> 24 NA    vermis ix     Vermis_IX        #> 25 right ix            Right_IX         #> 26 left  x             Left_X           #> 27 NA    vermis x      Vermis_X         #> 28 right x             Right_X          #> 29 left  dentate       Left_Dentate     #> 30 right dentate       Right_Dentate    #> 31 left  interposed    Left_Interposed  #> 32 right interposed    Right_Interposed #> 33 left  fastigial     Left_Fastigial   #> 34 right fastigial     Right_Fastigial

title: ggsegSUIT 1.0.0
